personal.name: Ta Tan Dat
personal.title: Full-Stack Developer
personal.tagline: Specializing in PHP & Laravel with hands-on experience in modern web technologies and self-hosted deployments.

about.bio: I'm a Mid-level Full-Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience building and maintaining production web applications. I specialize in PHP & Laravel for backend development, with hands-on experience in Node.js, Vue.js, and Next.js. I'm passionate about clean architecture, scalable systems, and continuously expanding my tech stack beyond my comfort zone.
highlights: Self-hosted Next.js portfolio on personal server

experience.company: Công Ty Phần Mềm Việt Vang
experience.description: Responsible for the development and maintenance of multiple client-facing web applications using PHP, Laravel, Node.js, and Vue.js, managing the full lifecycle of several projects from requirement analysis to production deployment.

experience.company: Công Ty Phần Mềm Việt Vang
experience.description: Built dynamic UI components using Laravel Blade, Bootstrap, and jQuery/AJAX. Applied MVC + Service + Repository architecture patterns and RESTful API concepts in a real-world production environment.

projects.name: Delta POS
projects.description: A comprehensive POS management system for F&B and retail businesses. Features include QR code ordering, multi-payment methods, xCyberBill e-invoice integration (VAT & non-VAT), inventory management with barcode scanning, role-based access control, and a standalone receipt printing app packaged as a Windows .exe.

projects.name: HyperSoft
projects.description: A middleware web application bridging HyperSoft POS and the xCyberBill e-invoice platform, automating invoice data transmission. Integrated PayOS payment gateway to handle service plan renewals.

projects.name: Minpo Recruit
projects.description: A recruitment platform for elementary school teachers in Tokyo, Japan. Analyzed existing codebase and independently developed new features aligned with established design patterns.

projects.name: ALOA E-commerce
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with Laravel backend and Vue.js frontend. Integrated xCyberBill e-invoice and developed a custom inventory management package following FIFO principles with daily snapshot mechanism for accurate stock tracking.

projects.name: Uni-Taxi
projects.description: Taxi booking application with integrated MoMo and OnePay electronic payment gateways, handling end-to-end transaction flows including payment processing and manual refund management.
